data.content: Added BUILTIN_SKILL_PROMPTS map in knots-backend.ts with a local shipment skill prompt. Modified buildClaimFallbackPrompt to prefer local skill prompts before falling back to kno skill CLI. The shipment skill includes auto-discovery logic: check main, check feature branches, search for knot-referencing commits, or roll back to ready_for_implementation. Tests added for builtin skill usage, CLI fallback for non-builtin states, and combined failure scenario. All 1664 tests pass. Commit: 384b176
